title: Syncalathium qinghaiense
taxonomy: Syncalathium qinghaiense is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of thistle, belonging to the genus Syncalathium. This genus is part of the tribe Cardueae and subtribe Echinopsinae. Syncalathium qinghaiense is native to Qinghai Province in China. It is considered an endangered species due to its limited geographic range.
